info.name: Retrieve time-series data for a dataset

params.name: database_code
params.description: Short code identifying the database (e.g. WIKI, FRED).

params.name: dataset_code
params.description: Short code identifying the dataset within a database.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format.

params.name: limit
params.description: Limit the number of returned rows.

params.name: column_index
params.description: Request a single specified column (0 = date).

params.name: start_date
params.description: Inclusive lower bound for the date filter (yyyy-mm-dd).

params.name: end_date
params.description: Inclusive upper bound for the date filter (yyyy-mm-dd).

params.name: order
params.description: Sort order of returned rows.

params.name: collapse
params.description: Sampling frequency to collapse the time series to.

params.name: transform
params.description: Transformation to apply to the data series.

items.docs: Retrieve time-series data for a dataset
